outputs.description: The report ID of the file or URL that was detonated to sandbox. ThreatStream.Analysis.Status The report status of the file or URL that was detonated in the sandbox.
outputs.name: ThreatStream.Analysis.ReportID

outputs.description: The platfrom that was used for detonation. ThreatStream.Analysis.Verdict The report verdict of the file or URL that was detonated in the sandbox. The verdict will remain "benign" until detonation is complete.
